summary: Daily check-in streak feature fully tested (backend + frontend). All 7 backend pytest cases pass (initial state, first check-in, same-day no increment, totals bumped, auth-required, sessions regression, admin login). UI: StreakPanel renders correctly in left sidebar with flame icon, current-streak=0 initially, Daily Reminder section, Enable button. Notification permission auto-denied in headless Chromium (expected) — Enable click does NOT crash; panel correctly shows 'Notifications blocked in browser settings.' message. After /api/streak/checkin via browser fetch + reload, panel updates to 'CHECKED IN' badge + current-streak=1 + '1 · 2 min total'. Regression OK: Solfeggio 528 preset, custom freq slider, play/pause+timer countdown still work.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend: minor visual nit — 'CHECKED IN' badge top-right and the number on the same row are visually fine; ensure on mobile the badge does not wrap awkwardly.
Backend: _date_minus uses datetime.date.fromordinal which is fine, but a simpler `datetime.fromisoformat(d).date() - timedelta(days=1)` would be more idiomatic. Not a bug.
Frontend StreakPanel: scheduleReminder is reset on every enabled/time/permission change (good) but window.__hfReminderT leaks if component unmounts. Minor.
Auto check-in fires at >=60s but task description says >60s — effectively identical; current threshold is 1.0 minute via `if (minutes >= 1)`. Matches spec.

Toggling reminder time/enable persists to localStorage keys hf_reminder_enabled and hf_reminder_time correctly per code review (verified by reading the code; could not fully exercise UI because headless Chromium denies Notification permission, so the toggle/time-input branch is not rendered).
test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 (works). Fresh users registered per test run for clean streak state.
seed_data_creation: Tests register transient users with email prefix TEST_streak_<uuid>@example.com and create a TEST_session that is deleted at end of test_session_crud.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend streak endpoints: GET /api/streak and POST /api/streak/checkin (body {minutes: float}) are stable. New users start at all-zero. Same-day re-check-in bumps totals only. Headless browser cannot grant Notification.permission — use the documented shortcut (browser fetch to /api/streak/checkin then reload) to verify CHECKED IN UI state. Notification toggle + time-input branch of StreakPanel.jsx cannot be exercised in headless Chromium; code review of that branch was performed instead.
